description: A university rocketry team needs to maximize the altitude of their competition rocket without altering its mass, dimensions, or motor (G80). Using the starting design at /home/ga/Documents/rockets/drag_heavy_rocket.ork, perform an aerodynamic optimization by changing all external surface finishes to 'Polished', updating fin cross-sections to 'Airfoil', and removing the launch lug. Save the optimized design to /home/ga/Documents/rockets/optimized_rocket.ork. Document the baseline apogee, the optimized apogee, the net altitude gain, and a summary of the aerodynamic changes in a report at /home/ga/Documents/exports/aerodynamic_report.txt.
